description.unified: Charges a total of 2 time(s). On the first attack, moves behind the enemy and deals Physical Damage, knocking them down for [1sec->1.8 sec]. On the second attack, moves behind the enemy with the highest Attack, dealing Physical Damage, knocking them down for [1sec->1.8 sec], and increasing their Physical Damage taken by [20%->30%] for 4 sec.

Removes your harmful effects and puts all allies into [Reading the Wind] state for [7sec->10 sec], increasing Attack by 333(1+0.3Skill Level) and Physical Evasion Chance by [300->350]. When a target in [Reading the Wind] state successfully evades, all allies’ Critical Damage is increased by [2%->3%] for [7sec->10 sec]. This effect stacks up to 10 times.
Attacks enemies in a circular area around you, dealing Physical Damage and stunning them for 1.8 sec. This skill gains an additional [800->500] Physical Defense Penetration.

Increases Critical Hit Chance by [(added) 150], and Normal Attacks ignore the target’s damage reduction effects. On Normal Attack, has a [20%->15%] chance to deal additional Physical Damage, stunning the target for [0.5sec->0.6 sec] and [increasing Physical DMG taken by 15%->reducing their Physical Defense by 25%] for 5 sec.

IV.unified: Stuns hit enemies for [1 sec->3 sec].

dark.unified: On each attack, reduces the target’s Mana by [250->400].
Reduces the target’s Healing Effectiveness by [20%->40%] for [7 sec->6 sec].

light.unified: Normal Attack damage is increased by [(added) 25%], and the cooldown of all skills is reduced by 2 sec.

dark.unified: At the start of battle, increases Defense Penetration by 400 for [10 sec->2 sec] and grants immunity to status ailments for 5 sec. The Defense Penetration increase cannot be dispelled.

description.unified: [Tornado Strike] increases the chance of dealing additional DMG by [5%->10%], and if the target is a Hero, deals additional P.DMG equal to {0}% of the target’s Max HP.

dark.unified: On Normal Attack, increases Attack by 3% and Physical Evasion Chance by [35->30] for 10 sec. This effect stacks up to 10 times.
